summary: Frontend regression for DialBox bug-fix iteration. Verified scroll fix, missing pickup caption, MindLine full name capture, MindLine annoyance without profanity, Knock Knock potty-humor variety, Miss Cleo rename, and Endless Adventure unrestricted spooky theme. All targeted behaviors pass.

test_results_detail.scroll_bug_fix: PASS — window.scrollY stayed at 0 after pressing digits 4, 1, 0 in sequence (delta=0 each press). CrtConsole now scrolls only its inner container.
test_results_detail.pickup_handset_caption_removed: PASS — string '↓ pick up the handset' no longer present in DOM.
test_results_detail.layout_controls_above_crt: PASS — lift/keypad/tap-to-talk render above the Line Monitor (CRT).
test_results_detail.knock_knock_variety_and_potty: PASS — 3 unique jokes across 3 consecutive pulls: 'Wooden shoe', 'Poo-tato' (potty), 'Tootpaste' (potty).
test_results_detail.endless_adventure_scary_theme: PASS — theme 'a spooky haunted house' produced an atmospheric opening scene (iron gate, fog, music-box) with 3 choices; no refusal.
test_results_detail.mindline_full_name: PASS — Dr. Dialtone confirmed 'Did you say Poo Poo Face?' (full multi-word name captured, not just 'Poo').
test_results_detail.mindline_annoyance_no_profanity: PASS — after insult 'you are a stupid damn idiot', reply was 'Please direct your aggression toward the appropriate family member.' — annoyed, no profanity.
test_results_detail.fortune_caller_rename: PASS — persona list shows '5 Miss Cleo — Island seer who speaks in warm Jamaican patois'; no 'Miss Calypso' anywhere.
test_results_detail.regression_no_audio_channel_error: PASS — '// audio channel unavailable' never appeared in the Line Monitor across all flows.

critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is 1272 lines — recommend splitting per-line handlers (mindline, adventure, knockknock, magic8, fortune) into custom hooks for maintainability.
CrtConsole scroll fix is correct (el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight on ref container); good pattern.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 targeted items in this iteration verified via live UI on REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Playwright pattern: wait ~1.5s after lift, wait 3-6s after single-digit auto-dial (INTER_DIGIT_MS=1300 + API), 20-25s for AI adventure generation. Read transcript via [data-testid='crt-console'] innerText; keypad selectors button:has-text('<digit>').first.
